visa_types.name: Tourist Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Document Required Checklist
Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html)
Important Notice: Visa applications of persons with a valid residence permit in any other country than Algeria, will not be treated by Embassy of Switzerland in Algeria. They have to apply in their country of residence. This is valid for all kind of applications.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa Fees applicable for Tourist, Relatives/Friend, Business, Conference, Sports and Cultural are: -

[che > dza > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 1]
VFS Service fees is 3500 DZD can be paid in Cash or with Credit / Debit Card.
The applicant who submit their applications at visa Application centre should pay the visa fee in Cash in Algerian Dinar.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Algerian Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee & service charges is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- Below are the additional optional services available at the visa application centre at nominal price

[che > dza > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 3]
All optional services are non-refundable.
VISA Fee Exemption:
- Children below 6 years old
- Scientific researchers, as regulated in recommendation No. 2005/761/EG of the European Parliament
- Representatives of charitable organizations up to the age of 25 years, who travel to take part in meetings or conferences
- Family relatives of EU- /EFTA- and Swiss citizen
- Members of the Olympic committee
- Holders of a normal passport going officially to meetings or conferences organized by an agency according to the following list
https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf (https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf)
.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period.
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.forms:
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html)
Document Required Checklist
Declaration of consent
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is for applicants who intend to travel to Switzerland for holiday and recreation purposes.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for applicants who intend to travel to Switzerland for holiday and recreation purposes.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable for Tourist, Relatives/Friend, Business, Conference, Sports and Cultural are: -

[che > dza > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 1]
VFS Service fees is 3500 DZD can be paid in Cash or with Credit / Debit Card.
The applicant who submit their applications at visa Application centre should pay the visa fee in Cash in Algerian Dinar.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Algerian Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee & service charges is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- Below are the additional optional services available at the visa application centre at nominal price

[che > dza > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 3]
All optional services are non-refundable.
VISA Fee Exemption:
- Children below 6 years old
- Scientific researchers, as regulated in recommendation No. 2005/761/EG of the European Parliament
- Representatives of charitable organizations up to the age of 25 years, who travel to take part in meetings or conferences
- Family relatives of EU- /EFTA- and Swiss citizen
- Members of the Olympic committee
- Holders of a normal passport going officially to meetings or conferences organized by an agency according to the following list
https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf (https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf)
.

## Documents Required
Document Required Checklist
Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html)
Important Notice: Visa applications of persons with a valid residence permit in any other country than Algeria, will not be treated by Embassy of Switzerland in Algeria. They have to apply in their country of residence. This is valid for all kind of applications.

## Photo Specification
Please provide one recent photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself. The photographs should be in color and:
																					
- Taken against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background
- Clear share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling (without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering)
- Please stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note:
Please follow these instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete. Photo booth meeting these requirements is available at the centre.
- Full face, non-smiling (without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period.
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html)
Document Required Checklist
Declaration of consent

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Official trips (participation to a meeting / session / workshop) if the invitation is sent from the United Nations Office or any other International Organizations in Genève or an Embassy / Mission in Genève / Bern
visa_types.full_text:

During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period.
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is for applicants who intend to travel to Switzerland for a Training/Workshop for less than 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for applicants who intend to travel to Switzerland for a Training/Workshop for less than 90 days.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable for Tourist, Relatives/Friend, Business, Conference, Sports and Cultural are: -

[che > dza > en > Table:Training Visa (Less than 90 days) > Visa Fees 1]
VFS Service fees is 3500 DZD can be paid in Cash or with Credit / Debit Card.
The applicant who submit their applications at visa Application centre should pay the visa fee in Cash in Algerian Dinar.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Algerian Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee & service charges is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- Below are the additional optional services available at the visa application centre at nominal price.

[che > dza > en > Table:Training Visa (Less than 90 days) > Visa Fees 3]
All optional services are non-refundable.
VISA Fee Exemption:
- Children below 6 years old
- Scientific researchers, as regulated in recommendation No. 2005/761/EG of the European Parliament
- Representatives of charitable organizations up to the age of 25 years, who travel to take part in meetings or conferences
- Family relatives of EU- /EFTA- and Swiss citizen
- Members of the Olympic committee
- Holders of a normal passport going officially to meetings or conferences organized by an agency according to the following list
https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf (https://www.eda.admin.ch/dam/eda/de/documents/aussenpolitik/voelkerrecht/DV-liste-abkommen-org_DE_FR_EN.pdf)
.

## Documents Required
Document Required Checklist
Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html)
Important Notice: Visa applications of persons with a valid residence permit in any other country than Algeria, will not be treated by Embassy of Switzerland in Algeria. They have to apply in their country of residence. This is valid for all kind of applications.

## Photo Specification
Please provide one recent photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself. The photographs should be in color and:
																					
- Taken against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background
- Clear share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling (without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering)
- Please stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note:
Please follow these instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete. Photo booth meeting these requirements is available at the centre.
- Full face, non-smiling (without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period.
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html)
Document Required Checklist
Declaration of consent
